question: The line chart shows the cost from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is true based on the chart as displayed?

options.A: The cost in 2022 is equal to the cost in 2019.
options.B: The chart does not allow an exact comparison of the 2022 cost with earlier years because the 2022 value extends beyond the visible scale.
options.D: Cost increased by the same amount every year.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bar to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
